channel.title: GitHub, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by GitHub, Inc. (github_m).

item.title: CVE-2026-47130 · 7.1 HIGH — NextCRM has a BOLA/IDOR in PATCH /api/crm/contacts/[id] that allows Cross-Tenant CRM Data Tampering
item.description: NextCRM is open-source customer relationship management (CRM) software. Versions prior to 0.12.0 have a Broken Object Level Authorization (BOLA/IDOR) vulnerability exists in the CRM contact and target update endpoints. The application fails to verify…

item.title: CVE-2026-47129 · 8.1 HIGH — NextCRM has Broken Access Control in Server Actions that allows any authenticated user to deactivate/activate arbitrary accounts
item.description: NextCRM is open-source customer relationship management (CRM) software. Versions prior to 0.12.0 have a Broken Access Control (BAC) vulnerability in the `activateUser` and `deactivateUser` Next.js Server Actions of NextCRM. The application fails to v…

item.title: CVE-2026-44508 · 8.1 HIGH — Rsync: Integer overflow in compressed-token decoding
item.description: Rsync is a file-copying tool that uses a delta-transfer algorithm to synchronize remote and local files. In versions prior to 3.4.3, the receiver's compressed-token decoder accumulated a 32-bit signed counter without checking for overflow. A maliciou…

item.title: CVE-2026-44507 · 4.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Rsync: hostname/ACL bypass on DNS-lookup failure
item.description: Rsync is a file-copying tool that uses a delta-transfer algorithm to synchronize remote and local files. In versions prior to 3.4.3, when using a daemon configured with a chroot, the reverse DNS lookup of the connecting client was performed after the…

item.title: CVE-2026-64650 · 6.3 MEDIUM — AI SDK Codex Harness Tool Relay Authorization Bypass
item.description: The `@ai-sdk/harness-opencode` tool is an HarnessV1 adapter backed by @openai/codex-sdk, which drives the codex command line interface. Prior to version 1.0.29, the tool relay authorizes requests from any process whose command line contains an allowe…

item.title: CVE-2026-44509 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Rsync: Symlink races on path-based syscalls
item.description: Rsync is a file-copying tool that uses a delta-transfer algorithm to synchronize remote and local files. In versions prior to 3.4.3, previous bug fixes for symlink races in open() calls missed races in other path based system calls like chmod() and c…

item.title: CVE-2026-64651 · 6.3 MEDIUM — AI SDK OpenCode Harness Tool Relay Authorization Bypass
item.description: The `@ai-sdk/harness-opencode` tool connects HarnessAgent to OpenCode through a sandboxed bridge. Prior to version 1.0.28, the tool relay authorizes requests from any process whose command line contains an allowed helper script path (`host-tool-mcp.m…

item.title: CVE-2026-55219 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Paymenter: Race condition in payWithCredit() enables credit double-spend
item.description: Paymenter is a free and open-source webshop solution for management of hosting services. In versions prior to 1.5.5, the credit payment implementation in app/Livewire/Invoices/Show.php executes a pessimistic row lock (lockForUpdate()) outside of an a…

item.title: CVE-2026-47198 · 8.5 HIGH — Paymenter: URL parameter injection bypasses paid plan limits at checkout
item.description: Paymenter is a free and open-source webshop solution for management of hosting services. In versions prior to 1.5.1, the checkout component improperly filters URL-writable properties, allowing authenticated users to inject arbitrary key-value pairs i…

item.title: CVE-2026-53596 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — FreeScout has unrestricted file upload without rate limiting that leads to resource exhaustion (DoS)
item.description: FreeScout is a free help desk and shared inbox built with PHP's Laravel framework. Prior to version 1.8.224, the FreeScout helpdesk application does not enforce rate limiting on the file upload endpoint. Any user can flood the server with upload requ…

item.title: CVE-2026-53595 · 9.4 CRITICAL 🌩️ — FreeScout vulnerable to anonymous account takeover via /user-setup empty invite_hash on MySQL
item.description: FreeScout is a free help desk and shared inbox built with PHP's Laravel framework. Prior to version 1.8.224, the public endpoint `POST /user-setup/{hash}/{invite_sent_at}` (`OpenController@userSetupSave`) selects the target account solely by its `inv…

item.title: CVE-2026-53594 · 4.9 MEDIUM — FreeScout has Arbitrary File Read in App Logs Viewer via Forged Encrypted Path
item.description: FreeScout is a free help desk and shared inbox built with PHP's Laravel framework. FreeScout's `Manage -> Logs -> App Logs` feature uses the bundled `rap2hpoutre/laravel-log-viewer` override to decrypt a user-supplied file identifier and then pass th…

item.title: CVE-2026-44585 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Paymenter: Broken object level authorization via service reference manipulation on ticket creation
item.description: Paymenter is a free and open-source webshop solution for management of hosting services. In versions prior to 1.5.0, the ticket creation endpoint accepts a user-supplied service identifier without enforcing ownership validation, allowing authenticate…

item.title: CVE-2026-44583 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Paymenter: Blind Unauthenticated SSRF on the Paypal gateway module
item.description: Paymenter is a free and open-source webshop solution for management of hosting services. In versions prior to 1.5.0, the PayPal webhook endpoint /extensions/paypal/webhook processes the PAYPAL-CERT-URL HTTP header without validation, allowing attacke…

item.title: CVE-2026-44584 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Paymenter doesn't reset email verification status after email change
item.description: Paymenter is a free and open-source webshop solution for management of hosting services. In versions prior to 1.5.0, the email update functionality fails to invalidate the existing verification state when a user changes their email address, allowing…

item.title: CVE-2026-53593 · 8.8 HIGH — FreeScout Vulnerable to Authenticated Remote Code Execution via incomplete upload extension denylist (.pht) — bypass of CVE-2025-48471
item.description: FreeScout is a free help desk and shared inbox built with PHP's Laravel framework. Prior to version 1.8.224, the denylist that neutralizes dangerous file uploads (`Helper::$restricted_extensions`) is incomplete: it does not cover the `.pht` extension…

item.title: CVE-2026-53592 · 4.6 MEDIUM — FreeScout vulnerable to prototype pollution in getQueryParam
item.description: FreeScout is a free help desk and shared inbox built with PHP's Laravel framework. A Prototype Pollution condition in the `getQueryParam` function `/public/js/main.js` and was addressed in version 1.8.139 by blocking URL query keys matching the patte…

item.title: CVE-2026-53591 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — FreeScout Vulnerable to Unauthenticated Conversation Thread Injection via HMAC Length Bypass in FetchEmails
item.description: FreeScout is a free help desk and shared inbox built with PHP's Laravel framework. Prior to version 1.8.223, an unauthenticated attacker can inject messages into any existing support conversation by sending a single email to the helpdesk's public add…

item.title: CVE-2026-44230 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — RT: Reflected Cross-Site Scripting in search results chart
item.description: RT is an open source, enterprise-grade issue and ticket tracking system. Versions 5.0.4 up to (but not including) 5.0.10, and 6.0.0 up to (but not including) 6.0.3 contain a reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability where an attacker who can…

item.title: CVE-2026-44231 · 9.1 CRITICAL — RT: Privilege escalation and information disclosure via REST 2.0 user collection endpoint
item.description: RT is an open source, enterprise-grade issue and ticket tracking system. Versions prior to 5.0.10, 6.0.0 and above, prior to 6.0.3 contain an information disclosure and privilege escalation vulnerability in the REST 2.0 API. A privileged (non-adminis…

item.title: CVE-2026-44229 · 5.4 MEDIUM — RT: Cross-Site Scripting via inline-served uploaded content
item.description: RT is an open source, enterprise-grade issue and ticket tracking system. Versions 5.0.0 and 6.0.0 and above, prior to both 5.0.10 and 6.0.3 contain a Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability where uploaded content is served inline rather than as an a…

item.title: CVE-2026-44228 · 5.4 MEDIUM — RT: Stored Cross-Site Scripting via insufficient template escaping
item.description: RT is an open source, enterprise-grade issue and ticket tracking system. Versions 6.0.0 and above, prior to 6.0.3, contain a stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability, where user-controlled data is rendered without proper HTML escaping. An auth…

item.title: CVE-2026-44227 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — RT: Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via URL parameters
item.description: RT is an open source, enterprise-grade issue and ticket tracking system. Versions 6.0.0 and above, prior to 6.0.3 contain a reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability. An attacker who can induce an authenticated RT user to visit a crafted URL…

item.title: CVE-2026-48812 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — FreeScout Allows Unauthenticated Access to Legacy Attachment Files
item.description: FreeScout is a free help desk and shared inbox built with PHP's Laravel framework. Prior to version 1.8.221, FreeScout's attachment download route skips token authentication for any attachment whose `token_type` is set to `1` (`TOKEN_TYPE_LEGACY`). B…

item.title: CVE-2026-45295 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — FreeScout Vulnerable to Unauthenticated Thread Read-Status Manipulation and Conversation Enumeration via Open Tracking Endpoint
item.description: FreeScout is a free help desk and shared inbox built with PHP's Laravel framework. Prior to version 1.8.219, the open tracking endpoint `GET /thread/read/{conversation_id}/{thread_id}` allows unauthenticated attackers to enumerate valid conversation…

item.title: CVE-2026-55639 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — xrdp: Out-of-bounds read in GCC Conference Create Request CS_SECURITY processing (xrdp_sec_process_mcs_data_CS_SECURITY)
item.description: xrdp is an open source RDP server. Versions 0.10.6 and prior contain a vulnerability concerning the parsing of Client Security Data within the Client MCS Connect Initial PDU with GCC Conference Create Request during the connection sequence. During th…

item.title: CVE-2026-55626 · 8 HIGH — xrdp: No authentication required with Xvnc backend on RHEL 9
item.description: xrdp is an open source RDP server. In versions 0.10.6 and prior, when an authenticated user session is initialized using the Xvnc backend over UNIX domain sockets, the Xvnc process is launched with insufficient authentication mechanisms. A local auth…

item.title: CVE-2026-34239 · 7.5 HIGH — Chamilo Authenticated Remote Code Execution
item.description: Chamilo version 1.11.40 and earlier are vulnerable to authenticated remote code execution in the main/inc/ajax/lang.ajax.php path. This endpoint is protected only by `api_protect_course_script(true)`, which means any authenticated user enrolled in a…

item.title: CVE-2026-46715 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Flask-Security-Too OAuth reauthentication freshness bypass via cross- user OAuth identity acceptance
item.description: Flask-Security-Too allows users to add security features to their Flask applicationa. Version 5.8.0's OAuth reauthentication flow can mark a session as fresh after verifying an OAuth account that belongs to a different user. If an attacker can operat…

item.title: CVE-2026-39878 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Chamilo stored XSS via user registration leads to admin account takeover
item.description: Chamilo LMS versions 1.11.38 and earlier contain a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in the user registration form that allows any unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary JavaScript in an administrator's browser session, leading to full…

item.title: CVE-2026-46555 · 7.7 HIGH — WhatsApp MCP: Unauthenticated bridge API allows message sending and arbitrary file exfiltration
item.description: WhatsApp MCP Server is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for WhatsApp, enabling Claude to read and send WhatsApp messages. Prior to version 0.2.1, the `whatsapp-bridge` HTTP API listens on `127.0.0.1:8080` without authentication and without Host…

item.title: CVE-2026-55238 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — xrdp: Malformed Confirm Active capability sets cause out-of-bounds reads
item.description: xrdp is an open source RDP server. Versions 0.10.6 and prior contain a vulnerability concerning the processing of RDP Confirm Active PDU, where during the capability negotiation phase, the parser did not perform sufficient length validation for speci…

item.title: CVE-2026-42210 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Webmin 2FA requirement bypass
item.description: Webmin is a web-based system administration tool for Unix-like servers. Prior to version 2.640, for Webmin accounts that require a second authentication factor (typically TOTP), an attacker with knowledge of the username and password can bypass the 2…

item.title: CVE-2026-58484 · 7.1 HIGH — Network-AI: Poisoned environment backup manifest allows arbitrary recursive deletion during backup pruning
item.description: Network-AI is a TypeScript/Node.js multi-agent orchestrator. Prior to version 5.12.2, `EnvironmentManager.listBackups()` reads each backup's `_manifest.json` and trusts the manifest's `path` field. `EnvironmentManager.pruneBackups()` later passes tha…

item.title: CVE-2026-40187 · 8.6 HIGH — Authenticated RCE via Malicious eTemplate Upload in EGroupware
item.description: In egroupware version 26.0 and earlier, an authenticated administrator can achieve OS-level Remote Code Execution (RCE) by uploading a malicious eTemplate XML file (`.xet`) to the VFS `/etemplates` mount. The `Widget::expand_name()` method passes tem…

item.title: CVE-2026-54538 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — xrdp: Pre-auth infinite loop via totalLength=0 in TS_SHARECONTROLHEADER
item.description: xrdp is an open source RDP server. In versions 0.10.6 and prior, a n issue was discovered where the software fails to properly validate the totalLength field within the RDP protocol control header during packet reception. An unauthenticated remote at…

item.title: CVE-2026-39879 · 7.1 HIGH — SQL injection in syslog-ng SQL destionation driver
item.description: Due to a missing sanitization call in [`afsql_dd_run_query`](https://github.com/syslog-ng/syslog-ng/blob/649e6e18e3459fb4467000a88dfb12fa97f9719c/modules/afsql/afsql.c#L219), syslog-ng before 4.12 are vulnerable to SQL injection from an untrusted sou…

item.title: CVE-2026-44978 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — xrdp: Unchecked FIPS padding length in standard RDP Security causes heap out-of-bounds read in HMAC verification
item.description: xrdp is an open source RDP server. Versions 0.10.6 and prior contain a heap out-of-bounds read vulnerability within the FIPS-specific receive paths. This vulnerability does not affect the default configuration of xrdp. The vulnerability is only explo…

item.title: CVE-2026-39385 · 7.1 HIGH — Frappe LMS enrollment bypass in paid courses via unrelated batch
item.description: Frappe LMS is an open source learning management system. In version 2.51.0 and earlier, a user could bypass payment validation for courses by using unrelated batch. This has been patched in 2.52.0 with enrollment now validating that the batch is link…

item.title: CVE-2026-44178 · 8.8 HIGH — xrdp: Channel Data Forwarding Fixed-Size Buffer Overflow
item.description: xrdp is an open source RDP server. Versions 0.10.6 and prior contain a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability within the virtual channel forwarding mechanism. When forwarding data from a remote client to the internal channel server, the xrdp proces…

item.title: CVE-2026-55645 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — xrdp: Out-of-bounds read in Client Control PDU processing (xrdp_rdp_process_data_control)
item.description: xrdp is an open source RDP server. Versions 0.10.6 and prior contain a vulnerability concerning the processing of Client Control PDUs. During the RDP connection sequence, the parser does not perform sufficient length validation before reading specifi…

item.title: CVE-2026-47276 · 6.5 MEDIUM — NULL Pointer Dereference in REST API properties_parse via Malformed user_properties
item.description: In nanomq versions 0.24.11 and earlier, a NULL pointer dereference in `properties_parse()` allows an authenticated attacker to crash the NanoMQ broker by sending a POST request to `/api/v4/mqtt/publish` with `user_properties` as a JSON array instead…

item.title: CVE-2026-42218 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — XRDP is vulnerable to a server timing attack, leading to user enumeration
item.description: xrdp is an open source RDP server. Versions 0.10.6 and prior contain a timing side-channel vulnerability in the login interface. Due to a discrepancy in response processing times, a remote attacker can infer the existence of a username on the system,…

item.title: CVE-2026-47275 · 2.6 LOW — nanomq NULL Pointer Dereference in MQTTv5 Client CONNECT Decoder Leading to Remote DoS
item.description: In nanomq versions 0.24.11 and earlier, a NULL pointer dereference in `nni_mqttv5_msg_decode_connect()` allows a malicious MQTT broker to crash any connecting NanoMQ MQTTv5 client (including bridge mode) with a single packet, causing remote denial of…

item.title: CVE-2026-41521 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — xrdp: lib_framebuffer_update Has Integer Overflow Heap Info Leak & ASLR Bypass
item.description: xrdp is an open source RDP server. Versions 0.10.6 and prior contain an integer overflow vulnerability when processing screen update messages within the vnc-any connection mode. A malicious remote VNC server can send crafted image dimensions that cau…

item.title: CVE-2026-35217 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — NanoMQ Incorrectly Accepts a Malformed SUBSCRIBE and Can Be Driven into an ASAN-Detectable Out-of-Bounds Read
item.description: NanoMQ contains a protocol-semantics flaw in its MQTT v5 `SUBSCRIBE` handling: if a subscription entry is missing the final 1-byte `Subscription Options` field, the broker may still accept the malformed packet and install the subscription into intern…

item.title: CVE-2026-58482 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Network-AI: ApprovalInbox HTTP server has no authentication — anyone can approve pending agent actions
item.description: Network-AI, a TypeScript/Node.js multi-agent orchestrator, has a shipped, exported, documented feature called `ApprovalInbox` (`lib/approval-inbox.ts`). It is the network surface of the human-in-the-loop Approval Gate, which `ApprovalGate` uses to re…

item.title: CVE-2026-46701 · 7.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Network-AI: Unauthenticated Cross-Origin MCP Tool Invocation via Empty Default Secret
item.description: Network-AI is a TypeScript/Node.js multi-agent orchestrator. Prior to version 5.4.5, the MCP SSE server defaults to an empty secret (`process.env['NETWORK_AI_MCP_SECRET'] ?? ''` at `bin/mcp-server.ts:89`), which causes `_isAuthorized` (`lib/mcp-trans…

item.title: CVE-2026-58481 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Network-AI: AgentRuntime sandbox path-prefix checks allow file access outside the configured base directory
item.description: Network-AI is a TypeScript/Node.js multi-agent orchestrator. Prior to version 5.12.2, `AgentRuntime` promises scoped file access under a configured sandbox `basePath`, but its path containment checks use raw string prefix tests. A sandbox base such a…

item.title: CVE-2026-41252 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — xrdp: lib_palette_update Heap Buffer Overflow & RCE
item.description: xrdp is an open source RDP server. Versions 0.10.6 and prior contain a missing bounds check in xrdp, which allows a heap-based buffer overflow when operating in vnc-any mode. The issue occurs during the handling of RFB protocol color map messages fro…
